canonical_definition: The latent ability of deep layers in an MLLM to refine generated content into grammatically correct and structurally appropriate natural language outputs after cross-modal integration.

definitions.text: The latent ability of deep layers in an MLLM to refine generated content into grammatically correct and structurally appropriate natural language outputs after cross-modal integration.

characterization: The latent ability of deep layers in an MLLM to refine generated content into grammatically correct and structurally appropriate natural language outputs after cross-modal integration.
